name: Team Ops
description: Agent templates for engineering teams. Bug triage, deployment pipelines, and status reporting — teach your team agent-driven workflows.
author: ClawDad

setup.title: About You
setup.subtitle: So your agents know who they're working for.

setup.title: Atlassian
setup.subtitle: For Jira and Confluence access. Skip if you don't use Atlassian.

setup.title: Source Code
setup.subtitle: Where your repos live. Both are optional.

tiers.recipe: Team workflows that connect to Jira, GitHub, GitLab, and CI/CD pipelines

connections.name: Plugged In
connections.description: Connected an external service (Jira, GitHub, etc.)

connections.name: Ticket Machine
connections.description: Created or updated a Jira ticket via agent

connections.name: Librarian
connections.description: Agent read from Confluence or wiki

operations.name: On Watch
operations.description: Set up a polling task for project monitoring

operations.name: Night Shift
operations.description: Scheduled task ran while you were away
